capabilities.name: Recurring/subscription invoices
capabilities.verify: subscription-billing-cron (due manual subs → invoice) + generate_subscription_invoice skill + subscriptions.next_invoice_date/billing_interval
capabilities.notes: Verify-first 2026-06-12: engine already exists for invoice-billed (manual) subscriptions — audit 'missing' was stale. Remaining: proration (P1.1), card-provider recurring is Stripe-native.

capabilities.name: Credit/debit notes
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3, after the cumulative-guard fix deployed): invoice INV-2026-00015 (12500) → create_credit_note 5000 → CN with total_cents=-5000, already_credited_cents=0, remaining_creditable_cents=7500; create_credit_note 10000 → correctly REJECTED ('Credit 10000 exceeds remaining creditable amount 7500 (invoice total 12500, already credited 5000)'). Mechanism: invoices.invoice_type + credited_invoice_id + create_credit_note RPC/skill (full negates remaining, partial = -amount, cumulative over-credit rejected; migrations 20260614090000 → 20260627220000 → 20260704181000) + admin UI: CreditNoteDialog (full/partial + reason) launched from InvoiceDetailSheet 'Issue Credit Note'
capabilities.notes: Was broken by a PER-CALL (not cumulative) over-credit guard: it compared a single credit against the invoice total but not against already-issued credits, so two partial credits (5000 then 10000 on a 12500 invoice) both passed → -15000 credited, an AR-integrity break. Caught by live verification 2026-07-04; the 2026-06-14 scratch check only exercised a single over-total credit. Fixed: create_credit_note now sums existing credit notes and rejects when the running total would exceed the total; full credit negates the REMAINING balance; a fully-credited invoice is rejected (forward-dated 20260704181000, supersedes 20260614090000 + 20260627220000). Fix deployed and re-verified live. Remaining follow-up (not blocking done): ledger reversal posting on credit-note issue.

capabilities.name: Partial/over/under payment handling
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3 evidence): created invoice INV-2026-00013 (total 12500) via manage_invoice, then record_invoice_payment 5000 → remaining_cents=7500 paid_amount=5000; record_invoice_payment 20000 → correctly REJECTED ('Payment 20000 exceeds remaining balance 7500'); record_invoice_payment 7500 → remaining_cents=0, status='paid', paid_amount=12500. Mechanism: invoices.paid_amount_cents tracked by reconcile_invoice_payments (bank path) + record_invoice_payment RPC/skill (manual partial payments, overpay rejected, status→paid when settled) (migration 20260614100000) + admin UI: RecordPaymentDialog (prefilled outstanding balance, client-side overpay guard) launched from InvoiceDetailSheet 'Record Payment', paid/total progress shown on invoice detail
capabilities.notes: Bank-rec partial/over/under already existed; manual payment path added and now runtime-verified end-to-end (partial → overpay-reject → settle → paid). UI shipped 2026-07-03 (src/components/admin/invoices/RecordPaymentDialog.tsx).

capabilities.name: AR aging report
capabilities.verify: LIVE E2E VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-04 (Stage-3, after the fix deployed): ar_aging_report() returned success:true with real buckets (total_outstanding_cents=53,712,500; current 53,675,000; overdue_1_30 37,500) and a per-customer breakdown (Niklas Frost 40M, Lisa Operations 13.5M, …) — no per_customer error. Mechanism: buckets open invoices (total_cents - paid_amount_cents > 0, invoice_type='invoice', status<>cancelled) per customer into current/1-30/31-60/61-90/90+ days overdue vs due_date; admin UI: 'Aging Report' tab on /admin/invoices (src/components/admin/invoices/ArAgingReportTab.tsx)
capabilities.notes: Was briefly broken by a latent CTE-scope bug (the totals SELECT referenced the per_customer CTE out of scope → 'relation "per_customer" does not exist'), caught by live verification 2026-07-04 and fixed by aggregating the already-computed v_customers array (migration 20260703140000 corrected + forward-dated 20260704180000). Fix deployed to rzhj and re-verified live. A clean example of static inspection passing while runtime failed — Stage-3 rule vindicated.
